qualifier: [visited as a suitor of Rohanne Webber]

qualifier: [suitor pursuing Rohanne Webber for marriage to repay his debts]
evidence_snippet: Simon was a suitor of Lady Rohanne Webber, attending her at Coldmoat. He was deeply in debt and hoped to repay them by marrying her.
